# Privacy Policy for Mopey Discord Bot
### Last Updated: June 22, 2026

Hello! This is the Privacy Policy for the Discord bot Mopey (hereinafter referred to as the "Bot"). We value your trust and want you to know exactly how your data is handled. Spoiler alert: we only collect the bare minimum required for the Bot to function.

If you have any questions, you can always visit our [Support Server](https://discord.gg/FE4dqGD).

## 1. Who We Are and How to Contact Us
The Bot Mopey is operated by an independent sole developer. The best and fastest way to contact the developer, ask questions, or request data deletion is through our [official Discord support server](https://discord.gg/FE4dqGD).

## 2. What Data We Collect
Mopey respects your privacy. We DO NOT read your private messages, DO NOT spy on your servers, and DO NOT collect sensitive personal information.

Here is everything we actually process:

- Discord User ID: A unique numerical identifier of your Discord account. It is necessary for the Bot to recognize who it is interacting with.

- In-Bot Profile Data: This includes only game-related or custom profile data created when you interact with Mopey's features (such as your statistics, levels, achievements, or in-bot preferences).

Important: We do not save the history of your text messages to our database. All text commands are processed "on the fly" in temporary memory (RAM) and are immediately discarded.

## 3. Why We Collect the Data (Purpose)
We use your data solely to ensure the proper functioning of the Bot:

- To maintain profile features (saving your progress, levels, or custom settings).
- To personalize your experience while interacting with Mopey.
- To prevent spam, abuse, and to ensure overall safety within the Bot.

## 4. Legal Basis for Processing (for EU/UK Users)
In accordance with GDPR, we process your data based on:

- Legitimate Interest: Processing your Discord User ID is necessary for the core functionality of the Bot.
- Consent: You voluntarily interact with the Bot, create a profile, and use its commands. You can withdraw your consent at any time.

## 5. Data Storage and Security
- All Mopey database records are securely hosted on servers provided by BisectHosting.
- The data is protected against unauthorized access.
- Access to the database is strictly limited to the sole developer of the Bot.
- We do not share, sell, or rent your data to any third parties.
## 6. Third-Party Data Sharing
Zero third parties. We do not cooperate with advertising networks, we do not collect external analytics, and we do not use third-party AI services that could harvest your data. Everything that happens within Mopey stays within the infrastructure of Mopey and BisectHosting.

## 7. Data Retention
All your data is retained for as long as the Bot is operational, or until you personally decide to remove them.

## 8. Your Rights (How to Access or Delete Your Data)
You have the right to request a copy of your data or ask for its permanent deletion. To do this, please join our [Support Server](https://discord.gg/FE4dqGD) and contact the developer. We will process your request manually within 30 days.

## 9. Children's Privacy (COPPA)
In compliance with Discord's Terms of Service, the Bot is not intended for children under the age of 13 (or the age of consent in your country, such as 16 in certain EU member states). We do not knowingly collect data from children under 13. If we become aware that we have accidentally collected data from a child under 13, it will be deleted immediately.

## 10. Changes to the Privacy Policy
We may update this text from time to time (for example, when Mopey gets cool new features). If significant changes are made, we will post an announcement on our [Support Server](https://discord.gg/FE4dqGD).
